title: NEEDLE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY GRANTS PASS NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential needle exchange program including disposal of used syringes and distribution of new syringes and equipment (sharps containers, alcohol preps, and first aid supplies). Also provides drug checking supplies, naloxone and overdose response training, HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing, and safer sex supplies. 132 NE B Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who use drugs or inject substances such as hormones or steroids, and their friends and family members Hours: Monday-Friday 1pm-4pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Third floor of Newman Methodist Community Building Services: Medical Waste Disposal Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Safe Sex Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
